headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .130 / .333 / .174.

nightly_recap: The Royals lost to the New York Yankees, KC 1, NYY 15. Bobby Witt Jr. led the night, 1-3 | HR, K, RBI in the latest Royals game. Bobby Witt Jr. supplied the loudest Royals contact at 111.3 mph.

player_of_game.name: Bobby Witt Jr.
player_of_game.reason: 1-3 | HR, K, RBI in the latest Royals game.
